steps.title: Find the roots
steps.content: Multiply by $-1$: $3x^2+7x-1=0$. Apply the quadratic formula with $a=3,b=7,c=-1$: $$x=\frac{-7\pm\sqrt{49+12}}{6}=\frac{-7\pm\sqrt{61}}{6}.$$

steps.title: Identify the greatest solution
steps.content: The larger root is $-\tfrac{7}{6}+\tfrac{\sqrt{61}}{6}$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
